brands.name: FIX
brands.description: Swedish nicotine pouch brand from Habit Factory known for fruit-led and dessert-led slim pouches across multiple strength levels.

brands.name: KLINT
brands.description: Swedish nicotine pouch brand from Habit Factory with broad mint, citrus, berry, floral, and spice coverage from mini to high-strength slim formats.

brands.name: Lucy
brands.description: Mainstream US nicotine pouch brand with slim-format fruit, mint, cinnamon, and coffee profiles at 4mg, 8mg, and 12mg strengths.

brands.name: ZONE
brands.description: Soft slim nicotine pouch brand focused on straightforward fruit and mint profiles in the UK market.

brands.name: Rogue
brands.description: Widely distributed US nicotine pouch brand built around spit-free regular-format pouches in 3mg and 6mg strengths.

brands.name: Skruf
brands.description: Swedish nicotine and snus brand with Super White pouch lines distributed across Nordic and European markets.
